# Parkezza

> Curated outdoor site furnishings for resorts, golf courses, developments, municipal facilities, parks, and recreation centers.

Parkezza presents high-end Signature and standard Essential outdoor site furnishing galleries including benches, bollards, picnic tables, shade structures, park shelters, commercial umbrellas, dog park stations, and more.

- Home: https://parkezza.com/
- Galleries: https://parkezza.com/galleries
- Quote: https://parkezza.com/quote
- Contact: https://parkezza.com/contact
